mapper.select: SELECT task.* FROM task WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET is_routine_task = #{isRoutineTask}, theme = #{theme}, date = #{date}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, description = #{description}, status = #{status, javaType=dev.odaat.Entity.Enums.TaskStatus, jdbcType=OTHER}, WHERE id=#{id};
